items.text: GeoFence_singleton shall establish a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.fragment: GeoFence_singleton shall establish a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.requirement_fragment: GeoFence_singleton shall establish a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1

items.text: GeoFence_singleton shall invoke circleLinearization function from geofence_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute distanceFromFence
items.fragment: GeoFence_singleton shall invoke circleLinearization function from geofence_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute distanceFromFence
items.requirement_fragment: GeoFence_singleton shall invoke circleLinearization function from geofence_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute distanceFromFence

items.text: GeoFence_singleton shall set timeToRecovery output port to 1.7
items.fragment: GeoFence_singleton shall set timeToRecovery output port to 1.7
items.requirement_fragment: GeoFence_singleton shall set timeToRecovery output port to 1.7

items.text: When simulation time t reaches or exceeds recovery time, distanceFromFence at current moment shall be greater than distanceFromFence at previous moment
items.fragment: When simulation time t reaches or exceeds recovery time, distanceFromFence at current moment shall be greater than distanceFromFence at previous moment
items.requirement_fragment: When simulation time t reaches or exceeds recovery time, distanceFromFence at current moment shall be greater than distanceFromFence at previous moment

items.text: System shall execute recovery action that moves system away from geofence boundary
